channel.title: Dremio Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Dremio Corporation (dremio).

item.title: CVE-2025-2298 · 8.4 HIGH — Authenticated API Endpoint Allows Arbitrary File Deletion in Dremio Software
item.description: An improper authorization vulnerability in Dremio Software allows authenticated users to delete arbitrary files that the system has access to, including system files and files stored in remote locations such as S3, Azure Blob Storage, and local files…
